plain_english: Only one thin mention exists: in the chat, Zero said he is watching Consolidated Water and flagged roughly $26 as the price he cares about. Nobody gave a confirmed buy point, a profit target, or a price that would prove the idea wrong, so there is nothing solid to act on yet. This is a name to keep on a watchlist, not a trade to take. Wait for a clearer setup or for Zero to confirm what he wants to do at $26 before risking money.
